title: Zombie Hunter
description: This Zombie hunts you up the trees.
body:
**Discontinued please use:**

[https://modrinth.com/mod/devyrs-zombies](https://modrinth.com/mod/devyrs-zombies)



**Zombie Hunter**

A zombie, that will run after you.

Zombie differences:

- faster than a vanilla zombie 
- less health than a vanilla zombie 
- Climbs and leaps at you.

Allowed in modpacks, with credits. 
No reuploading anywhere.

Made in MCreator.
